sections.paragraph:
fem. (from the root מָדַד)-

(1) extension, length, אִישׁ מִדָּה a man of tall stature, 1Ch 11:23 pl. אַנְשֵׁי מִדָּה Isa 45:14, and אַנְשֵׁי מִדֹּות (comp. as to the double plural of compounds Hebr. Gramm. § 106, 3). Jer 22:14, בֵּית מִדֹּות “a large (ample) house.”

(2) measure, Exo 26:2, Exo 26:8. תֶבֶל מִדָּה a measuring cord, Zec 2:5.

(3) i.q. מַד No. 2, a garment, plur. מִדֹּות Psa 133:2.

(4) from the Chaldee usage, tribute, Neh 5:4.
